justification: The diff attempts a Spring Boot 2 -> 3 migration but fails to remove the deprecated `WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter` (line 20), instead adding a misleading comment. It also incorrectly nests the security configuration methods (lines 27-44) into a deeply nested lambda structure that doesn't compile or match Spring Security 6 idioms. While it updates javax to jakarta and removes `@EnableEurekaClient`, the core security migration is broken and incomplete.
